name: AiSensy
description: WhatsApp Business API and marketing automation platform used by 60,000+ Indian SMBs for broadcasts and chatbots.

seo.title: AiSensy — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: AiSensy: WhatsApp Business API and marketing automation platform used by 60,000+ Indian SMBs for broadcasts and chatbots.

when_to_use: WhatsApp broadcast campaigns for Indian D2C brands
Abandoned cart recovery via WhatsApp automation
Chatbot for WhatsApp-based order status queries
Bulk product catalog sharing via WhatsApp Business
CRM sync for WhatsApp conversation history

pros: Affordable WhatsApp BSP pricing for Indian SMBs
Prebuilt broadcast and chatbot flows, minimal setup
Shopify, Zapier and Google Sheets integrations built in
Large Indian user base means plenty of templates
cons: Meta template approvals often slow through BSP
Reporting lacks cohort and attribution depth
Support quality drops on cheaper plans
UI crowded with upsells and feature prompts
review.verdict: Cheap, fast WhatsApp marketing stack for Indian SMBs — great starter BSP if you can live with limited analytics.
review.best_for: Indian D2C and SMB teams running WhatsApp broadcasts and basic chatbots
review.not_for: Enterprises needing multi-region compliance or advanced conversation analytics

lock_in.reason: WhatsApp Business API standard, templates portable
